name: @ont/regtest-e2e
description: ONT go-live regtest end-to-end harness (G1). NOT a shipped surface: spins a throwaway bitcoind -regtest node and drives the live publisher/indexer/web read path against it. Env-gated (ONT_E2E_REGTEST=1) so the hermetic suite needs no node.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/claim-path && npm run build -w @ont/anchor-store && npm run build -w @ont/header-store && npm run build -w @ont/name-state-store && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-indexer && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-publisher && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-resolver && npm run build -w @ont/launch-config && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-header && npm run build -w @ont/light-client && npm run build -w @ont/node-live && npm run build -w @ont/publisher && npm run build -w @ont/indexer && npm run build -w @ont/web && npm run build -w @ont/resolver && vitest run
